metadata.description: Extract ACP client implementation from crates/nexus42/src/acp/ into new crates/nexus-acp-host crate (worker-only linkage; enforced by CI gate verify-no-acp-in-daemon). Ship nexus42 acp-worker hidden subcommand stub for WS2 to grow into the JSON-RPC loop. Wave-0 spec: acp-client-tech-spec.md §11.
commits: e361b5a refactor(acp-host): move ACP modules to nexus-acp-host (WS1 T2-T5)
a2fcfe9 refactor(nexus42): consume nexus-acp-host via compat shim (WS1 T6)
ef36312 ci(verify-no-acp-in-daemon): enforce nexus42d linkage matrix (WS1 T9)
d95007a fix(acp-host): move tempfile to dev-dependencies (QC2-W01)
